artPrompt: A sprawling moonlit graveyard precinct of leaning bone-white headstones and a sagging civic gazebo, rows of plots receding under a blood-dark sky toward a looming clock tower. Guttering candles flicker on the graves; cold gold mist clings low to the ground, drifting ash catching the light. No central figure, only the deathly stillness of the highest-turnout precinct, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: The Grave Precinct
text:
{T}: Add {B}.
{1}, {T}, Pay 1 life: Put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. Then, if it is midnight (twelve or more doom counters), you draw a card.
Whenever a creature dies, you may pay {1}. If you do, you gain 1 life. The precinct never sleeps, on account of the residents.
flavorText: Highest voter turnout in the county. Lowest pulse.

extras.interaction: death precinct, votes from the grave
